be expected to pay at a network/standard retail pharmacy for a 
one-month supply of drugs. This estimate should be based on available plan data (such as the most 
current 6 months of PDE data) for retail pharmacies only. Neither retail extended day supply nor mail 
order location data should be included in the estimate. Plans that use a co-payment amount rather 
than a coinsurance percentage will not have a value in this field. 

Starting in 2016, CMS changed how they describe pharmacy
